name: Fort Worth Financial LLC
description_short: Fort Worth Financial LLC is a Texas-based mortgage lender offering purchase, refinance, FHA, VA, conventional, jumbo, and reverse mortgage loans with competitive rates.
description_long:
Fort Worth Financial LLC was founded in 2006 and operates as a full-service mortgage lender headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas. The company is led by Brett J. Ruddell (NMLS #343472) and holds NMLS licenses 359050 and 343472. They serve homebuyers and refinancers across the Fort Worth, Denton, Dallas, Weatherford, and Burleson areas of Texas.

The company specializes in a range of mortgage products including FHA loans, VA loans, conventional loans, home refinance loans, jumbo home loans, home purchase loans, reverse mortgages, and Texas cash-out refinancing options. They emphasize providing competitive rates and tailored loan solutions for each customer's unique situation. Their website includes loan calculators, rate quotes, qualification assessments, and a professional success center with educational resources.

Fort Worth Financial distinguishes itself through personalized service from experienced loan officers who claim to find customers the most competitive rates available. The company operates with a small team (2-10 employees according to LinkedIn) but maintains direct customer contact through their primary loan officer Brett Ruddell and a dedicated phone line (817-922-0202). They also provide real estate-related resources including property listings, home value tools, and realtor referrals.

As a state-regulated mortgage lender in Texas, Fort Worth Financial is subject to oversight by the Texas Department of Savings and Mortgage Lending. Consumers can file complaints and have access to the state recovery fund. The company has been operating for 18+ years, suggesting stability, though their small team size means limited staffing compared to larger national lenders. Rate competitiveness and approval timelines would depend on current market conditions and individual borrower qualifications.
pros: Licensed with dual NMLS IDs (359050 and 343472) and regulated by Texas Department of Savings and Mortgage Lending
Offers diverse loan products including FHA, VA, conventional, jumbo, and reverse mortgages on their website
Provides free online calculators and qualification tools directly on their website
Direct access to loan officer Brett Ruddell via phone (817-922-0202) and email for personal service
Serves multiple Texas markets: Fort Worth, Denton, Dallas, Weatherford, and Burleson
Includes value-added resources like home search, home values, realtor referrals, and professional success center
18+ year operating history (founded 2006) suggests established business longevity
cons: Very small team (2-10 employees) may result in slower response times during high-volume periods
Limited online presence and digital application options compared to larger national lenders
No disclosed information about rates, APRs, or specific loan terms on website—requires contacting company directly
Geographic service limited to five Texas cities; not available nationwide
Minimal third-party reviews or ratings visible on major consumer platforms
best_for: Texas homebuyers and refinancers in Fort Worth, Denton, Dallas, Weatherford, or Burleson seeking personalized service
Veterans and active military considering VA loan options with a local lender
First-time homebuyers who want to work directly with experienced loan officers
Borrowers seeking reverse mortgage options in Texas
diagnosis: Fort Worth Financial LLC is best for Texas-area homebuyers and refinancers who prefer working with a small, local lender offering personalized service and a full range of loan products. The main caveat is that their small team size and limited geographic footprint mean less 24/7 availability and no nationwide reach compared to larger mortgage companies.
services: Educational resources and professional success center
